title: Device Home Screen - No device connected - Closing Supported devices list
scenario: Home screen "Supported Devices" link navigates to device list and back arrow returns to Home screen
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Observe the Home screen with no device connected.
3. Tap the 'Supported Devices' link displayed on the Home screen.
4. Observe the list of supported devices with images and an 'Other devices' button.
5. Tap the back arrow ('<') to return to the previous screen.
expected: The user is returned to the Home screen after tapping the back arrow.
